---
title: "Research featured in U.N. Special Rapporteur report on economic insecurity and radical politics"
date: "2025-10-22"
categories: [media]
outlet: "U.N. Special Rapporteur"
outlet_url: "https://www.srpoverty.org/2025/10/01/far-right-populism-and-the-future-of-social-protection/"
outlet_label: "Report"
---

My research was featured in [U.N. Special Rapporteur Olivier De Schutter's report](https://www.srpoverty.org/2025/10/01/far-right-populism-and-the-future-of-social-protection/) on how economic insecurity has fueled far-right politics. The report was presented to the United Nations General Assembly. The original study, ["Politics of Boundary Consolidation: Income Inequality, Ethnonationalism, and Radical-Right Voting,"](https://doi.org/10.1177/23780231241251714) appeared in *Socius*.
